data_quality_notes: APPROXIMATE PROXY USED — not the hypothesized food waste legislation indicator. Used World Bank indicator SH.STA.SMSS.ZS (Safely managed sanitation services (%)) as a proxy for environmental/waste governance capacity. The original hypothesis required a binary dataset of food waste segregation mandates from REFASH legislative database, which is not machine-readable. The chosen proxy is a distant approximation. Direct legislation data covering 30+ countries would be needed for a definitive test. Caveats: enforcement variability, temporal lag between legislation and waste diversion, and reverse causality limit direct interpretation.
summary: Could not obtain food waste legislation data (REFASH database not accessible). Used Safely managed sanitation services (%) (SH.STA.SMSS.ZS) as an approximate governance/environmental proxy. Pearson r=0.686 (p=0.0000), n=369. Verdict: confirmed. This is an exploratory result using an approximate proxy; definitive testing requires structured food waste legislation data.
